description:
The PhotoCaptureSettings component is used to control the behavior of the PhotoCaptureManager and what it does.

See Settings.

fields.FingerGestureEnabled: Whether the finger photos should even render.
fields.NormalCaptureResolution: The resolution of pictures taken without timer.
fields.TimerCaptureResolution: The resolution of pictures taken with timer.
fields.TimerSeconds: How long the timer should be for timed photos.
fields.CapturePrivateUI: Whether finger photos should capture private ui elements like the dash.
fields.CaptureStereo: Whether photos should be 3D with a left and right "eye".
fields.StereoSeparation: how far apart the left and right "eye" are when taking stereo photos.
fields.AlwaysHideNameplates: Whether to always hide nameplates in taken photos.
fields.EncodeFormat: The format taken photos should output as.
fields.PhotoAutosavePath: Where to auto save photos in the inventory to.
fields.AutosaveActive: Whether to use the auto save photos to inventory feature.

methods.OpenAutosavePath: Opens the auto save path set in the settings.
